name: neon-agent-framework
description: Public-safe Neon-style agent runtime framework with onboarding, approvals, Discord wiring, and daemon tooling.

scripts.smoke: rm -rf ./.tmp/smoke-state ./.tmp/smoke-workspace && node dist/cli.js --help && node dist/cli.js onboard --non-interactive --state-dir ./.tmp/smoke-state --workspace ./.tmp/smoke-workspace --name smoke-agent --provider none && node dist/cli.js doctor --json --state-dir ./.tmp/smoke-state --fix --non-interactive && node dist/cli.js start --state-dir ./.tmp/smoke-state --once && node dist/cli.js run --state-dir ./.tmp/smoke-state "say ok" && node dist/cli.js task add --state-dir ./.tmp/smoke-state "write first owned task" && node dist/cli.js task list --state-dir ./.tmp/smoke-state --json && node dist/cli.js start --state-dir ./.tmp/smoke-state --prompt "say ok from start" && node dist/cli.js daemon render --state-dir ./.tmp/smoke-state
